steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The passage concludes that the Aubrey/Maturin series is best thought of as “a single incredibly long work” because books have abrupt endings that connect to the next installment.

steps.title: Match the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C states exactly this: the series' structure indicates it should be read as continuous narrative.

The other choices either introduce judgments not in the text (A about critical reputation, D about reader entertainment) or misread what's central (B focuses narrowly on two specific books).

That matches choice C — C is correct.
